synthetic_task_inputs.title: Confirm synthetic cleanroom HVAC qualification boundary
synthetic_task_inputs.description: Review the fictional system scope, room identifiers, and qualification-only boundary before local trial execution.

synthetic_task_inputs.title: Prepare synthetic HVAC readiness evidence checklist
synthetic_task_inputs.description: Prepare a local checklist for synthetic AHU, HEPA, pressure cascade, temperature, and humidity evidence visibility.

synthetic_task_inputs.title: Stage synthetic local workflow planning inputs
synthetic_task_inputs.description: Use controlled local inputs to exercise the configure and plan workflow path in later authorized trial work.

synthetic_task_inputs.title: Review synthetic workflow visibility states
synthetic_task_inputs.description: Check that status, source, standards, output, validation, and AI limitations remain visible in later authorized trial work.

synthetic_task_inputs.title: Record synthetic trial observations for later triage
synthetic_task_inputs.description: Capture issues, friction, and missing visibility as observations only, without triage or correction in M33.2.

operator_prompts_for_later_trial: Can the local workflow be exercised without real confidential data?
Are source and standards limitations visible?
Are output review and human-review-required states visible?
Are AI limitations visible and bounded?
Are defects and friction capturable without starting correction work?
